entry.title: New: BFED-15 Bill 10 (2026) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
BILL 10 (2026), AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2026 BUDGET: INCREASE ESTIMATED REVENUES, CARRYOVER/SAVINGS, GENERAL FUND; DEPARTMENT OF MANAGEMENT, INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY SERVICES PROGRAM, CATEGORY B - OPERATIONS & EQUIPMENT (BFED-15)

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
